Careers at ArthaBuild Your Legacy

Join Nepal's leading CA firm. A rigorous training ground for future financial leaders.

View Openings
Alumni Network
🎓

Artha Academy

Weekly "Learning Fridays" on NFRS, Audit, and Soft Skills.

🚀

Fast Track

Transparent path from Intern to Partner.

🤝

Mentorship

Direct guidance from partners and seniors.

Artha Advisory isn't just a workplace; it's a rigorous training ground. Whether you are an aspiring Chartered Accountant (CA) or a seasoned tax professional, we offer a culture of continuous learning and high-impact work.

🚀 Why Join Artha? ​

1. The "Artha Academy" (Training & Development) ​

We invest heavily in your growth. Every Friday is "Learning Friday," where we conduct:

  • NFRS Deep Dives: Practical case studies on complex accounting standards.
  • Soft Skills: Presentation, negotiation, and leadership workshops.
  • Tech Training: Excel mastery, Tally Prime, and Audit software certification.

2. Structured Training Programs ​

We offer specialized training tracks tailored to your academic path:

📘 CA Students (ICAN/ICAI)

Structured articleship program compliant with ICAN norms, focusing on Statutory Audit and Tax.

🌍 ACCA Students

Practical experience requirement (PER) support with exposure to IFRS/NFRS and global audit practices.

🎓 MBA / MBS Graduates

Management trainee programs focusing on Financial Analysis, Corporate Advisory, and System Audits.

📚 BBS / BBA Students

Internship opportunities to build a strong foundation in accounting, tax compliance, and corporate culture.

📢 Immediate Openings

We are actively hiring for the upcoming audit season. Join a team where your expertise is valued from day one.

Browse All Openings & Apply

3. Clear Career Path ​

From "Associate" to "Partner," your growth trajectory is transparent. We have a policy of promoting from within—50% of our current managers started as interns.

🤝 Artha Alumni Network ​

Once an Artha member, always a member.

Our alumni have gone on to become CFOs of leading banks, multinational corporations, and successful entrepreneurs.

View Our Alumni Network →
